draven.notes:
- Passive (League of Draven): Catch axes for attack damage stacking bonus
- Q (Spinning Axe): Throw axe, auto-attack returns it to you
- W (Blood Rush): Gain movement speed and attack speed briefly
- E (Stand Aside): Knock back enemies, slow them down slightly
- R (Apocalypse): Fire massive axe explosion hitting all enemies
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate, two-item powerspike critical
- tip: Stay behind minions to dodge spinning axes safely

mordekaiser.notes:
- Passive (Darkness Rise): Gain MS and damage aura near enemies
- Q (Obliterate): Swing hammer, hits enemies in cone area
- W (Indestructible): Shield self, heal when shield breaks or expires
- E (Tremors): Drag enemies toward you, deal damage around
- R (Realm of Death): Trap enemy champion alone, steal stats
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; mythic item completion
- tip: Stay mobile and avoid close range engagements

jarvaniv.notes:
- Passive (Martial Cadence): bonus damage on-hit after ability use
- Q (Dragon Strike): spear thrust that reduces armor, knockup
- W (Golden Aegis): shield and slow enemies in area
- E (Demacian Standard): place flag, gains attack speed nearby
- R (Cataclysm): jump to enemy, create trapping walls
- spike: level 6 with ultimate; triforce completion
- tip: avoid bunching near walls; position to escape ultimate cage

yuumi.notes:
- Passive (Bop 'n' Block): Grants shield when attacking; must leave ally to attack
- Q (Prowling Projectile): Fires homing projectile; damage increases if enemy is alone
- W (Zoomies): Attaches to ally, grants movement speed and heal over time
- E (Adaptive Force): Grants ally attack speed or ability power based on needs
- R (Final Chapter): Yuumi unleashes magic waves in area, slowing enemies hit
- spike: Level 6 ultimate provides huge teamfight value and utility
- tip: Exploit her vulnerability when detached; focus her before she reattaches

lux.notes:
- passive (Illumination): Enemies hit by abilities gain weakness, next hit deals bonus damage
- Q (Light Binding): Snare two enemies in laser line; roots them briefly
- W (Prismatic Barrier): Shield self and allies; shield bounces back to Lux for recharge
- E (Lucent Singularity): Place AoE that damages and slows enemies when detonated
- R (Final Spark): Fire massive laser dealing damage; executes low-health enemies instantly
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; two items for consistent burst damage
- tip: Stay behind minions to block her Q snare and poke

briar.notes:
- Passive (Hunger): Gain attack speed when near low-health enemies
- Q (Head Bash): Dash forward, knock up first enemy hit
- W (Blood Frenzy): AOE attack that heals based on damage dealt
- E (Bloodpack): Summon pack of hounds to attack nearby enemies
- R (Apex Predator): Leap to target, gain temporary invulnerability mid-flight
- Spike: Level 6 ultimate enables aggressive all-in teamfights immediately
- Tip: Stay grouped with allies; never isolate against Briar

urgot.notes:
- Passive (Echoing Flames): Attacks mark enemies; next attack triggers bonus damage.
- Q (Charges): Fires pellets in cone; reactivates to detonate for damage.
- W (Permanant Hulk): Toggle attacks slow and grant attack speed bonus.
- E (Disdain): Dashes forward, knocking back and slowing first enemy hit.
- R (Fear Beyond): Pulls and executes low-health enemies into Urgot's position.
- Spike: Level 6 ultimate enables forced engages and execution threats.
- Tip: Stay out of his effective range; respect ultimate execute threshold.

caitlyn.notes:
- Passive (Headshot): Bonus damage every few attacks or when near walls
- Q (Piltover Peacemaker): Fires skillshot that damages first enemy hit
- W (Yordle Snap Trap): Places trap that stuns and reveals enemies
- E (90 Caliber Net): Dashes backward while shooting enemies forward
- R (Ace in the Hole): Long-range execute shot through terrain
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; Infinity Edge powerspike
- tip: Stay behind minions to block trap placement and Ace shot

xerath.notes:
- Passive (Mana Surge): Mana regeneration increases with ability power
- Q (Arcanopulse): Charge and fire long-range explosive projectile forward
- W (Magister's Ascent): Blast area, slowing and damaging enemies hit
- E (Shocking Orb): Stun enemy hit, shorter range than other abilities
- R (Rite of the Arcane): Fire multiple bolts in chosen direction, recastable
- spike: Level 9 with Luden's Echo and boots completed
- tip: Stay behind minions and move unpredictably to avoid skillshots

thresh.notes:
- Passive (Damnation): Collect souls for armor and ability power stacks
- Q (Death Sentence): Hook enemy; pull self toward them if hits
- W (Dark Passage): Create lantern; allies click to dash toward it
- E (Flay): Push or pull nearby enemies; triggers on collision
- R (The Box): Create prison walls; enemies crossing take damage, slow
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; strong hook + teamfight control
- tip: Dodge hooks by moving unpredictably; position away from walls

leona.notes:
- Passive (Sunlight): Allies deal bonus damage to Leona's marked targets.
- Q (Shield Bash): Melee dash that stuns and deals damage.
- W (Eclipse): Grants armor and magic resist, reduces incoming damage.
- E (Zenith Blade): Long range dash that stuns on hit.
- R (Solar Flare): Large AoE stun in target area.
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes fearsome engage tool.
- tip: Space away from her; avoid clumping near teammates.

tristana.notes:
- Passive (Minigun): Range increases each level, stacking attack speed
- Q (Rapid Fire): Toggle attack speed boost, resets on kill/assist
- W (Rocket Jump): Leap forward, detonates bombs on landing nearby
- E (Explosive Charge): Stack bombs on enemies, detonate for damage
- R (Buster Shot): Knock back enemy, dealing damage based on range
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate, two-item power spike
- tip: Stay outside her effective range, punish her jump cooldown

masteryi.notes:
- Passive (Double Strike): Every few attacks, Yi strikes twice instantly.
- Q (Alpha Strike): Dash through enemies, becoming untargetable, dealing damage.
- W (Meditate): Channel to heal and reduce incoming damage briefly.
- E (Wuju Style): Passive attack speed boost; active true damage on hits.
- R (Highlander): Gain massive speed and attack speed, reset cooldowns on kills.
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; two-item power spike around 20 minutes.
- tip: Group with team and use crowd control before he engages.

irelia.notes:
- Passive (Ionian Fervor): Gain attack speed per nearby enemy, max 5 stacks
- Q (Bladestorm): Dash to enemy, resets on kill/assist, applies on-hit effects
- W (Defiant Dance): Block damage, slow attackers, retaliate with true damage
- E (Flawless Duet): Stun enemies hit twice, can cast again for second hit
- R (Vanguard's Edge): Launch blades in cone, create wall, slow enemies hit
- spike: Level 6 ultimate and Trinity Force powerspike, dominates teamfights
- tip: Stay spread apart to prevent multi-hit E stuns during fights

fiora.notes:
- Passive (Duelist's Dance): Marks enemy on side, hit grants movespeed and true damage
- Q (Lunge): Dash forward, hit applies on-hit effects and reduces cooldown on hit
- W (Riposte): Block incoming damage/cc, parry stuns and reflects damage back to attacker
- E (Bladework): Two-hit combo, second hit slows and grants attack speed boost
- R (Grand Challenge): Mark four vitals on enemy, hitting all grants massive true damage burst
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; mid-game with Trinity Force or Goredrinker
- tip: Maintain distance, group with teammates, avoid extended trades she can kite into

swain.notes:
- Passive (Ravenous Flock): Gain soul fragments from nearby deaths; 5 fragments heal and empower next ability
- Q (Death's Hand): Fire projectiles in cone; hits grant vision and slow enemies
- W (Vision of Empire): Long-range skillshot reveals and damages; slows if you hit an enemy
- E (Nevermove): Root nearby enemies in direction; can be reactivated to pull rooted targets
- R (Demonic Ascension): Transform into raven form, gain health, attack enemies nearby with projectiles
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; two-item power spike around Liandry's and Zhonyas
- tip: Avoid clumping; space away from teammates to minimize his ultimate teamfight value

lillia.notes:
- Passive (Dreamy State): bonus magic damage per nearby enemy, stacks infinitely
- Q (Pendulum): AOE damage in cone, applies passive stacks to hit enemies
- W (Watch Out! Eep!): dash away and leave slowing zone behind
- E (Swiping Swirl): dash forward dealing damage, resets on enemy hit
- R (Lillia's Lullaby): AOE sleep, damage based on enemy missing health percentage
- spike: level 6 with ultimate; two-item power spike mid-game
- tip: keep distance and avoid grouping; cleanse/QSS removes sleep effect

yone.notes:
- Passive (Spirit Cleave): Gain AD from missing health, max 50% bonus AD
- Q (Mortal Steel): Slash in direction, third cast fires projectile, applies on-hit
- W (Spirit's Refuge): Create shield zone, block projectiles, linger after Yone leaves
- E (Soul Unbound): Dash away leaving body behind, return to body or recast
- R (Fate Sealed): Knock up enemies in line, dash through them dealing damage
- spike: Level 6 ultimate; two items (Trinity/Sheen + AD item)
- tip: Stay away from walls; dodge his E return by positioning unpredictably

lissandra.notes:
- Passive (Iceborn Pact): Toggled—gain mana per second, convert mana to AP
- Q (Ice Shards): Hurl ice shards in line, slows enemies hit
- W (Ring of Frost): Freeze nearby enemies in place for short duration
- E (Glacial Path): Dash forward, leaving icy trail that slows enemies
- R (Frozen Tomb): Stasis self or enemy, then freeze nearby units
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; gains teamfight control and gank setup
- tip: Position away from her W range; buy early Merc Treads

illaoi.notes:
- Passive (Tentacle Smash): Tentacles spawn near enemies hit by abilities, attack independently
- Q (Tentacle Slam): Slam ground, tentacles attack in line, deals damage
- W (Harsh Lesson): Empowered auto-attack, triggers all nearby tentacles to attack
- E (Test of Spirit): Pull enemy spirit out, fight it separately, gain stats
- R (Leap of Faith): Leap forward, spawn tentacles around Illaoi, gain massive AOE
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; Trinity Force completion
- tip: Stay away from walls and avoid grouping near Illaoi

tahmkench.notes:
- Passive (An Appetite for a Kill): Stacks on enemy champion hits; at 3 stacks, devours them briefly
- Q (Tongue Lash): Ranged projectile that stuns and damages enemies hit
- W (Thick Skin): Damage reduction shield that converts excess blocked damage to mana
- E (Abyssal Dive): Tahm dives into terrain, gaining movement speed and repositioning
- R (Eat Tahm Kench): Transforms into larger form with enhanced abilities and stats
- Spike: Level 6 ultimate; significantly stronger post-first item completion
- Tip: Stay grouped and maintain distance; itemize grievous wounds to reduce sustain

jinx.notes:
- Passive (Get Excited!): attack speed boost after kill or tower destruction
- Q (Switcheroo!): toggle between minigun rapid-fire and cannon slow heavy damage
- W (Zap!): long-range skillshot that stuns if target recently took damage
- E (Flame Chompers!): place explosive traps that detonate when enemies approach them
- R (Super Mega Death Rocket!): global ultimate missile with increasing damage over distance
- spike: level 6 with ultimate; early items like Manamune powerspike
- tip: stay behind minions to block her W stun skillshot reliably

morgana.notes:
- Passive (Soul Siphon): heal from damaging enemies, increased by ability power
- Q (Dark Binding): root enemy hit by slow-moving projectile
- W (Tormented Soil): damage and slow enemies in area over time
- E (Black Shield): shield ally or self, blocks crowd control effects
- R (Soul Shackles): stun nearby enemies after delay if still close
- spike: level 6 with ultimate, then liandry's mythic completion
- tip: spread out and dodge her Q; buy hextech items for shields

veigar.notes:
- Passive (Phenomenal Evil Power): gain AP per enemy kill/assist, stacks infinitely
- Q (Baleful Strike): blast damages enemies, restores mana, grants permanent AP on kill
- W (Dark Matter): meteors fall after delay, deal damage in area
- E (Event Horizon): create cage, stun enemies touching edges for 2.5 seconds
- R (Primordial Burst): massive damage scales with enemy AP, execute if low HP
- spike: level 6 with ultimate, first complete AP item (Luden's/Liandry's)
- tip: respect his cage—position away from edges, buy early Negatron Cloak

garen.notes:
- Passive (Perseverance): Regenerate health when out of combat for 9 seconds
- Q (Decisive Strike): Spin forward, gain movement speed, silence first enemy hit
- W (Courage): Reduce incoming damage, gain armor and magic resist temporarily
- E (Judgment): Spin in place, hit enemies multiple times, apply bleed stacks
- R (Demacian Justice): Execute enemy champion, damage scales with missing health
- spike: Level 6 ultimate enables all-in; Stridebreaker first item very strong
- tip: Kite backwards and buy Grievous Wounds to counter healing sustain

ashe.notes:
- Passive (Frost Shot): Auto-attacks slow targets; Critical Strikes freeze enemies briefly.
- Q (Ranger's Focus): Charge up to stun with next auto-attack.
- W (Volley): Fire arrows in cone; applies slow to hit enemies.
- E (Hawkshot): Send hawk scout to reveal map area briefly.
- R (Enchanted Crystal Arrow): Global stun missile; longer range, longer stun distance.
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; critical item completes power spike.
- tip: Play around fog of war; dodge ultimate with positioning.

jax.notes:
- Passive (Grandmaster's Might): gains armor/MR per nearby item, max 10 stacks
- Q (Leap Strike): jumps to target, deals damage, resets on kill/assist
- W (Empower): next attack deals bonus damage, scales with AP
- E (Counter Strike): dodges attacks, stuns enemies hit when reactivated
- R (Grandmaster's Ascension): gains attack speed, bonus armor/MR, enhances Empower damage
- spike: level 6 with ultimate or first major item completion
- tip: keep distance and dodge his Q; don't cluster in teamfights

rell.notes:
- Passive (Ferromancy): Gain armor/magic resist per nearby enemy; convert to AD/AP
- Q (Break the Mold): Dash forward, damaging and knocking back enemies hit
- W (Magnetic Storm): Toggle between mounted and dismounted; mounted faster, dismounted tanky
- E (Attract and Repel): Pull ally or push enemy; swap positions when mounted
- R (Crash Down): Leap and stun enemies in area; pull nearby enemies
- Spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes dominant teamfight initiator then
- Tip: Stay spread out to reduce her multi-target impact and CC

amumu.notes:
- Passive (Cursed Touch): Enemies hit by abilities take increased magic damage for 3 seconds
- Q (Bandage Toss): Throw bandage; stun and pull enemy if it hits
- W (Despair): Toggle aura dealing magic damage to nearby enemies; costs mana per second
- E (Tantrum): Reduce incoming damage and retaliate with magic damage to nearby enemies
- R (Curse of the Sad Mummy): Stun all nearby enemies and drain their mana
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes powerful teamfight engage tool immediately
- tip: Stay spread out to minimize his ultimate's effectiveness; avoid grouping predictably

brand.notes:
- Passive (Blaze): Burn damage stacks to 3; at max, target is immobilized briefly
- Q (Sear): Projectile stuns if target already has Blaze; otherwise just damages
- W (Pillar of Flame): AoE damage in area; applies Blaze to all hit
- E (Conflagration): Spreads Blaze to nearby enemies; damages target with Blaze
- R (Pyroclasm): Bouncing fireball that chains; applies Blaze and bounces to Blazed targets
- Spike: Level 6 ultimate enables teamfight burst; Liandry's Torment multiplies burn damage
- Tip: Stay spread in teamfights to minimize R chain bounces between teammates

zaahen.notes: I don't have reliable information about a League of Legends champion named "Zaahen." This doesn't appear to be a current champion in the game. Could you verify the spelling or provide the correct champion name? I want to give you accurate information rather than guess.

warwick.notes:
- Passive (Eternal Hunger): Heal on hit; stacks attack speed with each basic attack
- Q (Jaws of the Beast): Lunge forward, heal based on missing health
- W (Blood Hunt): Gain MS toward bleeding/low-health enemies; reveal them
- E (Primal Howl): Roar to reduce incoming damage and slow nearby enemies
- R (Infinite Duress): Leap onto enemy, suppress and deal damage; heal per hit
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes lethal ganker with suppression
- tip: Ward river, group with teammates, and buy Quicksilver Sash early

ezreal.notes:
- Passive (Rising Spell Force): Attack speed increases per ability cast, stacks to 5.
- Q (Mystic Shot): Skillshot that refunds cooldown if it hits enemy or structure.
- W (Essence Flux): Slow projectile that damages enemies, heals allies hit.
- E (Arcane Shift): Blink forward with damage to nearest enemy champion.
- R (Trueshot Barrage): Global skillshot ultimate that damages all enemies in line.
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; mid-game with Manamune and Mythic item.
- tip: Respect his range, dodge predictable Q patterns, build defensively early.

missfortune.notes:
- Passive (Love Tap): Extra damage to different targets; resets on kill/assist
- Q (Double Up): Fires bullet through enemy; bounces to another nearby target
- W (Ricochet): Increases attack speed and gives attacks bouncing projectiles
- E (Make It Rain): Slows enemies in area; reveals them briefly
- R (Bullet Time): Fires massive barrage in cone; applies stacking effects
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; two-item power spike around mid-game
- tip: Spread out to minimize bouncing damage and ultimate effectiveness

singed.notes:
- Passive (Noxious Slimeball): Mana spent on abilities grants movement speed, stacking infinitely
- Q (Poison Trail): Leave toxic trail damaging enemies who walk through it
- W (Mega Adhesive): Create slowing field that roots enemies inside for duration
- E (Fling): Grab nearby enemy and hurl them behind you
- R (Insanity Potion): Gain stats, movement speed, and larger poison trail temporarily
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; scales into mid-game teamfights
- tip: Stay away from his poison trail; position behind minions

qiyana.notes:
- Passive (Royal Privilege): Gain attack speed after ability cast; stacks infinitely
- Q (Elemental Burst): Throw terrain-infused blade; damage varies by terrain type
- W (Terrashape): Collect terrain around you; empower next ability with terrain effects
- E (Audacity): Dash to enemy and gain movement speed after casting
- R (Supreme Display): Create shockwave ring that stuns enemies hit; scales with terrain
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; powerspike continues with Duskblade, Manamune
- tip: Stay away from walls and river; group to reduce terrain advantage

kayn.notes:
- Passive (The Darkin Scythe): gain stacks hitting champions; transform into Shadow or Darkin at 100 stacks
- Q (Reaping Slash): slash in direction, deals damage, resets on kill/assist
- W (Blade's Reach): fire projectile in line, slows and damages enemies hit
- E (Shadow Step): dash through terrain and walls, increased speed in walls
- R (Umbral Trespass): dive into enemy champion, deal damage, emerge elsewhere nearby
- spike: level 6 with ultimate, becomes roaming threat to all lanes
- tip: ward walls and river; restrict his wall access with vision control

nami.notes:
- passive (Aqua Prison): movement speed toward nearby allies; grants bonus when near them
- Q (Aqua Prison): stun enemy in targeted area after short delay
- W (Ebb and Flow): heal ally or damage enemy; bounces between targets
- E (Tidecaller's Blessing): empower ally's next attack with slow and bonus damage
- R (Tidal Wave): knock up enemies in line; create slow zone
- spike: level 6 with ultimate; two-item powerspike around Mythic + support item
- tip: stay spread out to avoid multi-target Ebb and Flow bounces

malzahar.notes:
- Passive (Void Shift): Gain shield after 8 seconds out of combat, refreshes periodically
- Q (Call of the Void): Fire void projectile dealing damage in a line, silences hit enemies
- W (Void Swarm): Spawn voidlings that attack enemies; E resets their cooldown instantly
- E (Malefic Visions): Infect target with damage over time; spreads on kill to nearby enemies
- R (Nether Grasp): Suppress target enemy for up to 2.5 seconds, dealing damage throughout
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes stronger with Liandry's Torment completion
- tip: Stay behind minions to block Q silence; buy Quicksilver Sash for ultimate suppression

xayah.notes:
- Passive (Clean Cuts): Feathers spawn on enemies hit; recall them for damage
- Q (Double Daggers): Fire feathers in cone; returns damage scales with feathers
- W (Deadly Plumage): Gain attack speed; feathers spawn on every auto attack
- E (Bladecaller): Recall all feathers, root enemies hit, damage scales with count
- R (Takedown): Dash away, spawn feathers around you, damage enemies on return
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; two items gives massive auto-attack damage
- tip: Stay away from grouped feathers; dodge her E root with positioning

xinzhao.notes:
- Passive (Determination): Gains attack speed; heal on third hit (stacks to 3)
- Q (Three Talon Strike): Three strikes; third knocks up enemies nearby
- W (Wind Becomes Lightning): Thrust forward, damage in cone; scales with attack speed
- E (Audacious Charge): Dash to enemy, slow nearby foes; reduces cooldowns on hit
- R (Crescent Guard): Leap, create arena, knock enemies away; gain shield and damage reduction
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; powerspike continues with Black Cleaver
- tip: Space away from him; dodge his E engage; group with teammates

twitch.notes:
- Passive (Contamination): Attacks poison enemies; stacked poison deals bonus damage
- Q (Ambush): Become invisible and gain movement speed briefly
- W (Plague Rats): Spawn rats that travel and explode for damage
- E (Spray and Pray): Shoot in cone; poisoned enemies take extra damage
- R (Rat-a-Tat-Pack): Gain attack speed and range; attacks fire faster
- spike: Level 6 ultimate grants massive attack speed and range
- tip: Buy early Executioner's Calling to counter poison stacking damage

trundle.notes:
- Passive (King's Tribute): Killing units restores health, stacks infinitely
- Q (Chomp): Empowered next attack deals damage, steals AD
- W (Frozen Domain): Creates zone granting movement speed and slow enemies
- E (Pillar of Ice): Summons pillar that stuns and blocks movement
- R (Subjugate): Steals target's resistances, gains stats, drags them
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes dominant duelist
- tip: Stay away from his pillar and frozen domain zones

ornn.notes:
- Passive (Forge): upgrades items for self and allies at intervals
- Q (Volcanic Rupture): launches magma in line, creates lava pillar terrain
- W (Bellows Breath): breathes fire in cone, applies brittle to enemies
- E (Searing Charge): charges forward, knocks up enemies, can reactivate for slam
- R (Forgefire Summit): summons volcanic terrain that damages and slows enemies
- spike: level 6 ultimate and first upgraded mythic item power spike
- tip: avoid clustering around pillars; position away from terrain walls

naafiri.notes:
- Passive (Pack Mentality): Gain stacks near allies; at max stacks, next ability knocksdown enemies
- Q (Predator's Pounce): Dash forward and slash enemies in a line
- W (Hounding Shots): Throw projectiles that split on hit, dealing damage in area
- E (Searing Bite): Bite target, heal based on damage dealt to them
- R (Weapon of the Masses): Transform with pack, gain speed, enhanced abilities, knockdown
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; midgame teamfights where packs amplify her
- tip: Spread out to deny Pack Mentality stacks and kite away

seraphine.notes:
- Passive (Inherent Melody): Nearby allies grant notes; max 5 notes, attacks consume for damage
- Q (High Note): Projectile skill shot; bounces between enemies, scales with notes consumed
- W (Surround Sound): Heal allies in area; grants movement speed to nearby champions
- E (Beat Drop): Stun line skill shot; wider with more notes consumed for damage
- R (Encore): Long range ultimate; stun line that hits all enemies in path
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; mid-game with Moonstone Renewer and staff items
- tip: Play around edges of fights; dodge E and R by moving perpendicular

teemo.notes:
- Passive (Invisibility): Invisible while stationary, breaks on movement or attack
- Q (Blinding Dart): Blind enemy, reducing their accuracy for short duration
- W (Move Quick): Self-speed buff, decays when taking damage from champions
- E (Toxic Shot): Passive poison damage on attacks, stacks for more damage
- R (Noxious Trap): Place invisible mushroom traps, explodes dealing damage and poison
- spike: Level 6 when ultimate unlocks; early mushroom map control
- tip: Use sweeper trinket and control wards to counter mushrooms

vayne.notes:
- Passive (Night Hunter): Gain movement speed toward nearby enemy champions.
- Q (Tumble): Dash and gain attack speed; next attack deals bonus damage.
- W (Silver Bolts): Third consecutive hit on target deals percent max health true damage.
- E (Condemn): Knock enemy back; stun if they hit terrain nearby.
- R (Final Hour): Gain stealth, range, and movement speed for short duration.
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; early Sheen/Trinity Force power spike.
- tip: Clump with teammates and restrict her kiting space aggressively.

kaisa.notes:
- Passive (Second Skin): Gain AD/AP from items; evolve abilities at thresholds
- Q (Icathian Rain): Fire missiles in cone; applies on-hit effects to enemies
- W (Void Seeker): Long-range projectile; marks enemy for bonus damage on hit
- E (Supercharge): Dash with attack speed boost; resets on takedowns
- R (Void Assault): Become invisible, dash toward enemy; reposition and engage
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; stronger at two items (AD/AP)
- tip: Respect her all-in potential; maintain distance and abuse her range limits

fizz.notes:
- Passive (Nimble Fighter): dodges projectiles; every third attack applies on-hit effects twice
- Q (Urchin Strike): dash to enemy, apply on-hit effects, reset if it kills
- W (Seastone Trident): empower next attack; applies poison damage over time stacking
- E (Playful/Trickster): become untargetable, jump away or toward; dodge enemy abilities freely
- R (Chum the Waters): launch shark that stuns and damages; knocks up on collision
- spike: level six ultimate; two items (Protobelt, Lich Bane) enable burst
- tip: respect E cooldown; position away from walls; buy Quicksilver for ult

shen.notes:
- Passive (Ki Barrier): Shield generation increases with energy, decays when out of combat
- Q (Twilight Assault): Slash enemies, restore energy, heal based on enemies hit
- W (Spirit's Refuge): Block projectiles in zone, redirect damage to Shen instead
- E (Shadow Dash): Dash across terrain, taunt first enemy hit, restore energy
- R (Stand United): Teleport to ally, grant shield, swap positions with them
- Spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes global threat with map pressure
- Tip: Spread out to limit his dash taunt targets and engagement range

sett.notes:
- Passive (Grit): Generates shield from enemy damage, converts to health on next hit
- Q (Knuckle Down): Dash forward, next auto attacks twice and slows enemies hit
- W (Haymaker): Charge and release powerful punch, damage scales with gathered grit
- E (Facebreaker): Stun nearby enemies, pull them toward Sett in both directions
- R (The Show Stopper): Grab enemy, suplex them, damage scales with combined health pools
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate, Mythic item completion dramatically increases threat
- tip: Maintain distance to avoid his E stun and W combo burst

nautilus.notes:
- Passive (Staggering Blow): Immobilizes next basic attack target; resets on ability hit.
- Q (Dredge Line): Pulls first enemy hit toward Nautilus; hooks terrain for mobility.
- W (Titan's Wrath): Shields Nautilus; basic attacks burn enemies in small area.
- E (Riptide): Sends shockwave outward; detonates near enemies for damage and slow.
- R (Depth Charge): Charges forward tracking enemy; knocks up all enemies hit.
- spike: Level 6 ultimate enables guaranteed engage and gank setup potential.
- tip: Stay spread; dodge Q by moving perpendicular; buy Quicksilver against ult.

maokai.notes:
- Passive (Sap Magic): Heal on ability hit; stacks grant damage reduction at max
- Q (Bramble Smash): Knockback skillshot that damages and slows hit enemies
- W (Twisted Advance): Dash to enemy, root them, gain shield
- E (Sapling Toss): Place saplings that explode near enemies, slow and damage
- R (Nature's Wrath): AOE root wave that damages and roots all hit
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes strong tank around Sunfire mythic
- tip: Space away from walls; dodge saplings; don't group without vision

syndra.notes:
- Passive (Transcendence): gain AP per enemy champion nearby, max 5 stacks
- Q (Dark Sphere): launch sphere dealing damage, leaves sphere on ground
- W (Force of Will): grab sphere or enemy, hurl it for damage
- E (Scatter the Weak): detonate nearby spheres, knock back and stun enemies
- R (Unleashed Power): launch all spheres at target for massive damage
- spike: level 6 ultimate; completed Luden's or Liandry's item spike
- tip: stay spread; dodge Q spheres; respect E stun combo range

leesin.notes:
- Passive (Flurry): Attack speed boost after ability use, stacks infinitely
- Q (Sonic Wave): Skillshot that marks enemy, recast dashes to them
- W (Safeguard): Shield ally or self, recast dashes to shielded target
- E (Tempest): AoE damage and slow, reveals enemies hit for seconds
- R (Dragon's Rage): Kick enemy in direction, knocks up nearby enemies
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes primary engage threat
- tip: Stay spread out to avoid multi-man kick combinations

tryndamere.notes:
- Passive (Battle Trance): gain attack damage per second, up to 35 bonus AD
- Q (Bloodlust): heal from damage dealt, scales with missing health
- W (Mocking Shout): slow enemies, terrify minions to stop their advance
- E (Spinning Slash): dash and reduce cooldown with each auto attack
- R (Undying Rage): become unkillable for 5 seconds, gain movement speed
- spike: level 6 with ultimate, nearly impossible to kill solo
- tip: build armor and kite backward; never engage close range fights

pantheon.notes:
- Passive (Mortal Will): Gain stacks on ability use; empowered next ability at 5 stacks
- Q (Comet Punch): Thrust spear forward; empowered version hits thrice and stuns
- W (Guardian's Call): Leap to ally or enemy; grants shield to nearby allies
- E (Aegis Assault): Dash forward blocking damage; reactivate to damage and stun enemies
- R (Grand Skyfall): Leap across map and crash down, damaging and slowing area
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes lethal roaming ganking threat immediately
- tip: Keep distance from minions; dodge his empowered Q stun engage attempts

sylas.notes:
- Passive (Petricite Burst): Gain shield after casting abilities; stacks up to 3, explodes at max
- Q (Chain Lash): Swing chain in direction, damage enemies, pull Sylas toward them
- W (Kingslayer): Dash forward and punch, damage and heal based on enemy missing health
- E (Abscond): Leap away, gain temporary shield, recast to chain-pull enemies toward you
- R (Hijack): Steal enemy ultimate and cast it once with bonus damage and cooldown
- Spike: Levels 6 and 11 when he gains access to powerful enemy ultimates
- Tip: Position away from Sylas to prevent his E chain from pulling you in chains

ekko.notes:
- Passive (Resonance): Hit enemies 2 times, third hit stuns and slows them
- Q (Timewinder): Throw disc dealing damage, returns and slows on return path
- W (Parallel Convergence): Create slow zone, reactivate to stun enemies inside it
- E (Phase Dive): Dash forward gaining shield, resets on champion/tower hits nearby
- R (Chronobreak): Rewind to previous position, heal based on damage taken
- spike: Level 6 ultimate enables aggressive plays and escape potential dramatically
- tip: Spread out to minimize W stun radius; dodge Q return path

darius.notes:
- Hemorrhage: Bleed stacks on hit, grants armor penetration at max stacks
- Decimate: Cleave damage, heals if you hit enemy champions
- Crippling Strike: Next attack slows and resets attack timer
- Apprehend: Pull enemy closer, gain movement speed away
- Noxian Guillotine: Execute damage, resets on kill, executes low-health enemies
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate, Stridebreaker or Black Cleaver completed
- tip: Stay outside his effective range, kite backwards relentlessly

jhin.notes:
- Passive (Whisper): Fires 4 shots, reload after; crit chance converts to AD
- Q (Dancing Grenade): Bouncing grenade that detonates on enemies or terrain
- W (Deadly Flourish): Long-range root shot; roots if enemy recently hit
- E (Captive Audience): Places lotus traps triggering slow and damage when walked on
- R (Curtain Call): Four long-range shots from position; each shot slows enemies
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; power spikes at Galeforce and Collector
- tip: Stay behind minions to block W root and deny spacing

renataglasc.notes:
- Passive (Glasc Protocol): Nearby enemies take increased damage; stacks per hit, max 5 stacks
- Q (Fascinate): Fires projectile; slows and reveals enemy hit, bounces to nearby targets
- W (Leverage): Grabs ally or enemy, pulls them toward Renata, empowers next attack
- E (Hostile Takeover): Shield on ally increases their damage; resets on takedown, spreads nearby
- R (Chemtech Insurgence): Enemies in area gain ramping damage vulnerability; Renata heals from damage dealt
- Spike: Level 6 with ultimate; strong at three items with ability haste
- Tip: Keep distance and dodge Q bounces; don't cluster against her ultimate effect

ahri.notes:
- Passive (Essence Theft): Gain stack on hit; heal at 9 stacks
- Q (Orb of Deception): Lob orb dealing damage, returns hitting enemies again
- W (Fox-Fire): Summon foxes attacking nearby enemies, prioritize closest target
- E (Charm): Charm enemy in direction, can't act while charmed
- R (Spirit Rush): Dash in direction up to three times instantly
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; most dangerous mid-game with items
- tip: Respect charm range; position behind minions to block projectile

olaf.notes:
- Passive (Berserker Rage): Gain attack speed per 1% missing health, scales infinitely
- Q (Undertow): Throw axe in line, returns to you, slows on hit
- W (Vicious Strikes): Heal based on missing health, gain attack speed for duration
- E (Reckless Swing): Melee strike dealing true damage, costs health to cast
- R (Ragnarok): Gain armor/magic resist and immunity to crowd control briefly
- spike: Level 6 ultimate makes him unstoppable; Tri-force completion
- tip: Kite away from him; don't fight in his effective melee range

smolder.notes:
- Passive (Scales): Gain AD per level; max stacks grant bonus attack speed
- Q (Bite): Skillshot that damages and applies on-hit effects to enemies hit
- W (Scorched Earth): Place fire zone; damage enemies inside, slows on exit
- E (Embersnap Trap): Lay trap that stuns and damages enemies triggering it
- R (Inferno's Breath): Channel fire breath cone; damage scales with missing enemy health
- spike: Level 6 ultimate and mythic item powerspike around 2-3 items
- tip: Play around side lanes; avoid grouping in narrow areas where R lands

volibear.notes:
- Passive (Frenzied Maul): Heal on attack, stacking up to 5 for burst heal
- Q (Rolling Thunder): Charge forward, knockup enemies, recast to leap again
- W (Maiming Bite): Next attack heals, applies bleed that triggers on movement
- E (Sky Splitters): Call lightning strikes in area, damaging and slowing enemies
- R (Thousand-Burned Fist): Transform into giant bear, gain size, AOE damage, enhanced abilities
- Spike: Level 6 with ultimate grants massive tankiness and teamfight power
- Tip: Kite backwards and avoid tight spaces where his AOE dominates

drmundo.notes:
- Passive (Adrenaline Rush): Mundo regenerates health every second, increased by missing health percentage
- Q (Infected Cleaver): Throw axe that damages and slows enemies hit; returns to Mundo
- W (Burning Agony): Toggle aura dealing damage to nearby enemies; costs health per second
- E (Masochism): Mundo gains attack damage based on missing health for short duration
- R (Sadism): Mundo heals massively over time and gains movement speed; long cooldown
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes unkillable without coordination or burst
- tip: Build grievous wounds early; reduce his healing to manageable levels immediately

blitzcrank.notes:
- Passive (Mana Barrier): Shield based on missing mana when taking damage
- Q (Rocket Grab): Pull enemy champion toward Blitzcrank; skillshot with long range
- W (Overdrive): Blitzcrank gains movement and attack speed for short duration
- E (Power Fist): Next attack knocks up enemy and deals extra damage
- R (Static Field): AOE damage and silence around Blitzcrank; damages nearby enemies
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; stronger after first hook item
- tip: Stay behind minions to block Rocket Grab; position unpredictably near walls

varus.notes:
- Passive (Living Vengeance): gain attack speed when killing units, stacks infinitely
- Q (Piercing Arrow): charge and fire arrow, damage increases with charge time
- W (Blighted Quiver): autos apply blight, three blights trigger damage and slow
- E (Hail of Arrows): rain arrows in area, reveals and damages enemies
- R (Chain of Corruption): infect enemy, spreads to nearby enemies on hit
- spike: level 6 with ultimate, two items with attack speed
- tip: stay spread out to minimize Chain of Corruption chain spread

talon.notes:
- Passive (Blade's End): Bleeding stack on hit; at max stacks, detonates for damage
- Q (Noxian Diplomacy): Empowered autoattack; refunds cooldown on kill
- W (Rake): Throw blades in cone; returns on recast, slowing enemies
- E (Shadow Assault): Dash through target; become untargetable briefly; gain stealth after
- R (Shadow Assault): Enhanced version with more dashes and larger stealth radius
- spike: Level 3 all-in with E; Serrated Dirk for burst
- tip: Stay near allies; Talon struggles fighting grouped enemies together

cassiopeia.notes:
- Passive (Serpentine Succession): gain movement speed when moving toward poisoned enemies
- Q (Noxious Blast): projectile that poisons and damages; refunds cooldown on poison hit
- W (Miasma): creates poison cloud that slows and poisons enemies inside
- E (Twin Fang): spits at target; doubles damage and healing if poisoned
- R (Petrifying Gaze): stuns enemies looking at her; slows those looking away
- spike: level 6 with ultimate; stronger with Liandry's Torment
- tip: stand behind minions or terrain to block stun angle and projectiles

aatrox.notes:
- Passive (Deathbringer Stance): Heal on third attack; scales with AD and missing health.
- Q (The Darkin Blade): Slash in cone; recast twice more; pull enemies to center.
- W (Infernal Chains): Chain enemies; explode after delay or if they move far enough.
- E (Umbral Dash): Dash and gain attack speed; resets on takedowns.
- R (World Ender): Transform; gain size, lifesteal, and extended Q range; move faster.
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; first Goredrinker or Black Cleaver completion.
- tip: Stay out of Q cone range; dodge chains; kite away from melee range.

vi.notes:
- Passive (Blast Shield): Gain shield after hitting enemies with abilities
- Q (Vault Breaker): Charge dash forward, knocking up enemies hit
- W (Wince Force): Passive attack speed; active punches in direction, damages nearby
- E (Excessive Force): Next attack hits twice, applies on-hit effects twice
- R (Final Spark): Dash to enemy champion, knocking aside enemies, stunning target
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; mid-game with Black Cleaver
- tip: Space away from walls; avoid grouping; build armor or mobility

aurelionsol.notes:
- Passive (Breath of Light): Stars orbit, damage enemies, heal on hit
- Q (Sparking Spellstone): Fire skill shot, explodes on enemy hit or delay
- W (Celestial Expansion): Toggle stars larger, slower, more damage and healing
- E (Escape Velocity): Dash forward, gain speed, leave star trail behind
- R (Voice of Light): Push enemies away, stun if they hit terrain
- spike: Level 6 ultimate and Liandry's Torment completion
- tip: Stay outside star orbit range, dodge Q, use mobility

viego.notes:
- Passive (Sovereign's Domination): heal per hit; possess enemy champion on kill
- Q (Blade of the Ruined King): slash in direction, applies on-hit effects
- W (Harrowed Path): dash forward leaving trail, allies gain movement speed
- E (Material Weakness): dash to target, mark them, next hit deals bonus damage
- R (Heartbreak): leap into target, possess them temporarily, gain their stats
- spike: level 6 with ultimate; becomes lethal with Black Cleaver
- tip: stay grouped and position away from isolated targets Viego can catch

shyvana.notes:
- Passive (Fury): gain fury on hits; transform into dragon at 100 fury
- Q (Twin Bite): next attack hits twice, resets auto attack timer
- W (Burnout): AOE burn damage around you; movement speed buff while active
- E (Flame Breath): breathe fire in cone dealing damage; applies dragon form bonus
- R (Dragon's Descent): transform into dragon, gain stats, move toward location
- spike: level 6 with ultimate; power spike after trinity force
- tip: kite backwards and avoid short trades; buy grievous wounds early

velkoz.notes:
- Passive (Void Rush): Stacks on hit, 3 stacks triggers true damage proc and brief move speed
- Q (Plasma Fission): Fires plasma bolt, splits into two projectiles on terrain or max range
- W (Void Rift): Launches rift that damages and slows enemies in area of effect
- E (Tectonic Disruption): Knocks up enemies hit, can combo with Q split for multi-target disruption
- R (Life Form Disintegration Ray): Channeled laser dealing heavy damage, reorients freely while active
- Spike: Level 6 with ultimate; power increases significantly at Liandry's completion
- Tip: Stay behind minions to block Q splits and deny easy true damage stacks

janna.notes:
- Passive (Tailwind): Move speed buff when moving toward nearby allies or away from enemies
- Q (Howling Gale): Channel then release to knock up enemies in a line
- W (Zephyr): Slow enemy and gain movement speed toward them; repeatable
- E (Eye Of The Storm): Shield ally and empower their attacks with bonus damage
- R (Monsoon): Push back enemies and heal nearby allies; lasts several seconds
- spike: Level 6 ultimate and completed Mandate item for team fight presence
- tip: Spread out to reduce ultimate knockback effectiveness and prevent chain CC

zed.notes:
- Passive (Contempt for the Weak): Deal bonus damage to enemies below 50% health
- Q (Razor Shuriken): Throw shuriken in straight line, hits enemies twice with shadows
- W (Living Shadow): Dash to shadow location, shadow mirrors your abilities for extra damage
- E (Shadow Slash): Slash nearby enemies, restore energy if shadow hits same target
- R (Death Mark): Become untargetable, create shadow clone, swap positions at end for burst
- spike: Level 6 ultimate enables all-in kills; Serrated Dirk first item spike
- tip: Build armor early and stay grouped; dodge shadow shurikens by moving sideways

akali.notes:
- passive (Assassin's Mark): Gain MS near enemies; mark on hit deals bonus magic damage
- Q (Five Point Strike): Throw stars in cone, returns to you, refund energy on hit
- W (Twilight Shroud): Dash and gain stealth cloud, slow enemies who enter it
- E (Shuriken Flip): Dash forward and flip backward, flip stuns if you hit Q first
- R (Perfect Execution): Dash to target twice, each dash deals damage and applies mark
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; stronger with Protobelt or Lich Bane
- tip: Ward river and side bushes; position away from walls she can dash near

heimerdinger.notes:
- Passive (Hextech Soul): gain stacks on ability cast; upgraded ability at max stacks
- Q (Hextech Turret): place turret that shoots enemies; upgrades fire faster and wider
- W (Techno Barrage): shoot missiles at enemies; upgrade fires more missiles in spread
- E (CH-2 Electron Storm Grenade): throw grenade stunning and damaging; upgrades stun longer and wider
- R (UPGRADE!!!): empower next ability; turrets gain shields, missiles spread, grenade stuns larger area
- spike: level 6 with ultimate; becomes zone control nightmare with upgraded abilities
- tip: destroy turrets immediately; don't group in narrow areas where grenades chain

lulu.notes:
- Passive (Pix, Faerie Companion): Pix grants attack speed; attacks on same target stack, max 3 stacks bonus damage
- Q (Glitterlance): Projectile passes through enemies, slows all hit
- W (Whimsy): Polymorphs enemy or grants ally haste and stats
- E (Help, Pix!): Shield on ally or damage on enemy with Pix positioning
- R (Wild Growth): Enlarges ally, knocks back enemies, grants health and slow aura
- Spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes unkillable support with ally protection
- Tip: Stay spread to minimize polymorph impact; dodge Q by moving sideways

neeko.notes:
- Passive (Inherent Glamour): Neeko gains attack speed after attacking; stacks infinitely, no cap
- Q (Nimble Counterattack): Fires projectile bouncing between enemies, dealing magic damage per hit
- W (Shapesplitter): Sends clone forward while becoming invisible; clone explodes on contact
- E (Tangle-Barbs): Roots first enemy hit, subsequent enemies slowed; roots spread on kill
- R (Pop Blossom): Neeko leaps up and explodes, damaging and stunning nearby enemies
- spike: Level 6 ultimate enables all-in burst and gank setup dramatically
- tip: Respect Neeko's clone positioning and never group too tightly around roots

bluecasterminion.notes:
I appreciate the question, but I need to clarify: Blue Caster Minions are basic minion units in League of Legends, not champions with abilities. They don't have passive, Q, W, E, or R abilities to list.

They're simply minions that deal magic damage and have no special mechanics beyond basic attacks and being targetable units worth gold when killed.

I cannot provide the requested format because the premise doesn't match the game's mechanics. Would you like information about an actual League champion instead?

I appreciate the detailed request, but I need to clarify: Sight Ward is not a League of Legends champion—it's a trinket item that provides vision control.

Sight Wards don't have abilities (passive, Q, W, E, R) or power spikes. They're static vision tools placed on the map.

I can't fulfill your requested format because it's designed for champion abilities, which Sight Wards don't have.

blastcone.notes:
I cannot provide this information as requested. Blast Cone is a plant/map object in League of Legends, not a champion with abilities (passive, Q, W, E, R). It's an interactive element that knocks nearby units away when triggered.

If you meant a specific champion, please clarify which one and I'll format the information accordingly.

evelynn.notes:
- Passive (Demon Shade): Invisible out of combat; heals when attacking weakened enemies
- Q (Hate Spike): Projectile that bounces between nearby enemies; applies on-hit effects
- W (Allure): Charm enemies in a cone; weakens them for follow-up damage
- E (Whiplash): Dash with bonus damage; triggers on-hit effects and applies charm
- R (Last Second Fragrance): AOE damage and charm in large radius; executes low-health enemies
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; becomes dominant after Mythic item completion
- tip: Ward river and jungle; group with teammates to deny isolated picks

chogath.notes:
- Passive (Carnivore): Cho'Gath gains stacks when killing units; at 6 stacks, permanently grow in size and stats
- Q (Rupture): Cho'Gath knocks up enemies in target area after brief delay
- W (Feral Scream): Cho'Gath silences enemies in cone in front of him
- E (Spiked Carapace): Cho'Gath gains armor/magic resist; reflects damage when hit
- R (Feast): Cho'Gath devours target, dealing true damage and growing permanently if kills
- Spike: Level 6 with ultimate provides execute threat; scales with size/items mid-game
- Tip: Stay away from walls and grouped positions to dodge Rupture knockup combos

yasuo.notes:
- Passive (Way of the Wanderer): gains flow shield on movement, breaks at max
- Q (Steel Tempest): slash that fires projectile, third cast knocks up
- W (Wind Wall): creates wall blocking projectiles for short duration
- E (Sweeping Blade): dash through enemy, reduced cooldown on same target
- R (Last Breath): knock up enemies, gain shield, dash through knocked targets
- spike: level 6 ultimate; immortal shieldbow first item powerspike
- tip: respect wind wall cooldown, position away from walls for ganks

elise.notes:
- Passive (Spider Infusion): Gain spiderlings on ability hits; max 3, grant attack speed
- Q (Neurotoxin/Venom): Execute spiders or damage; spider form deals percent max health
- W (Volatile Spiderling/Skittering Frenzy): Spawn spiders attacking target; spider form deals AOE poison
- E (Cocoon/Rappel): Stun target; spider form grants untargetable repositioning dash
- R (Spider Form): Transform into spider; gain spiderlings and enhanced abilities
- Spike: Level 6 with ultimate; power increases mid-game with AP items
- Tip: Respect her cocoon stun range; position away from walls and teammates

zoe.notes:
- Passive (More Sparkpack): Gain MS after hitting abilities; stacks refreshable
- Q (Skillshot): Shoots projectile that returns, dealing damage both ways
- W (Spell Thief): Picks up enemy summoner spells; grants temporary use
- E (Bubble): Stun projectile; hit enemies sleep briefly then take extra damage
- R (Portal Jump): Blink short distance; resets position for repositioning or escaping
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; completes first item around minute 10
- tip: Stay behind minions to block Q; position away from walls for E

ryze.notes:
- passive (Realm Warp): gain movement speed after casting spells, stacks infinitely
- Q (Overload): shoot projectile, applies passive stack; refreshes E cooldown at max stacks
- W (Rune Prison): stun target briefly, applies passive stack
- E (Spell Flux): damage nearby enemy, applies passive stack; bounces to nearby enemies
- R (Realm Warp): teleport short distance with allies in radius
- spike: level 3 with Q-W combo; Everfrost mythic item power spike
- tip: stay out of close range; dodge Q; group against his teamfight ultimate

sion.notes:
- Passive (Glory in Death): dies, becomes ghost, charges attack to deal damage
- Q (Decimating Smash): charges, slams ground, knocks up and damages enemies hit
- W (Soul Furnace): shield gained, explodes on reactivation or when shield breaks
- E (Roar of the Slayer): shouts, damages and slows enemies in cone direction
- R (Unstoppable Onslaught): charges forward unstoppably, knocks up enemies, gains size
- spike: level 6 with ultimate; first armor/health item powerspike
- tip: stay spread out to avoid ultimate knockup chain reactions

bard.notes:
- Passive (Meep): Collect chimes for damage and movespeed; 5 stacks grants meep
- Q (Cosmic Binding): Skillshot stuns first enemy, slows second
- W (Caretaker's Shrine): Place healing shrine; activates when nearby
- E (Magical Journey): Create tunnel; allies pass through faster than enemies
- R (Tempered Fate): Stasis all units in area; they're invulnerable
- spike: Level 6 with ultimate; midgame roam potential peaks
- tip: Play around tunnel entrances and avoid clustered positioning for ult

diana.notes:
- Passive (Moonsilver Blade): Gains attack speed; every third attack deals bonus damage in area
- Q (Crescent Strike): Fires arc dealing damage; enemies hit gain Moonlight mark for amplified damage
- W (Pale Cascade): Shields self and allies; orbiting spheres return to restore shields on reactivation
- E (Lunar Rush): Dashes to enemy or ally, detonates Moonlight marks for additional damage
- R (Moonfall): Pulls nearby enemies toward Diana and marks them with Moonlight
- Spike: Level 6 with ultimate; devastating all-in after first item completion
- Tip: Maintain distance and position near teammates to prevent isolated Lunar Rush engagements

kayle.notes:
- Passive (Transcendence): Attack speed and ability power scaling stacks with levels and items.
- Q (Radiant Blast): Projectile damages and slows enemies hit, heals on ally hit.
- W (Celestial Blessing): Kayle and nearby ally gain movement speed and healing instantly.
- E (Righteous Fury): Melee attacks become ranged, deal bonus magic damage, apply on-hit effects.
- R (Divine Judgment): Target becomes invulnerable and takes reduced damage after, short duration.
- spike: Level 11 transforms playstyle; Nashors Tooth and Lich Bane power spike.
- tip: Exploit early game weakness before level 6; deny teamfights near her ult.

mel.notes:
- Passive (Ascension): Gain stacks on ability hits; at 5 stacks, gain movespeed and damage buff
- Q (Spark Pack): Fire projectile; resets on hit, applies passive stack
- W (Comet Punch): Punch forward three times; third hit knocks back and stacks passive
- E (Full Metal Jacket): Gain shield and movespeed; reactivate to dash forward with damage
- R (Mega Supercharger): Place zone granting allies attack speed and movespeed; Mel gains doubled bonuses
- Spike: Level 6 with ult and first item (Divine Sunderer or Sunfire)
- tip: Keep distance to avoid stacking her passive; dodge her Q poke carefully
